news.t: Crypto ETFs: From Bitcoin to Hyperliquid
21shares Launches THYP and TXXH, the First U.S. ETFs Tracking Hyperliquid

overview.description: The 21Shares 2x Long HYPE ETF (TXXH) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in long hype, short usd currency. The fund provides 2x leveraged exposure to the daily price movement of Hyperliquid (HYPE) through derivatives, net of fees and expenses. The fund will not invest directly in HYPE. TXXH was launched on Apr 30, 2026 and is issued by 21Shares.
